### [Devices](/documentation/hiddriverkit/haptics-enum#Devices)

[Generic Device Controls](/documentation/hiddriverkit/generic-device-controls-enum)Usages associated with generic types of device information, such as battery level.[Keyboard or Keypad](/documentation/hiddriverkit/keyboard-or-keypad-enum)Usages related to keyboard and keypad devices.[LEDs](/documentation/hiddriverkit/leds-enum)Usages related to the LEDs and other indicators on the device.[Buttons](/documentation/hiddriverkit/buttons-enum)Usages for devices that contain user-selectable controls.[Ordinals](/documentation/hiddriverkit/ordinals-enum)Usages for custom-defined behaviors on a device.[Telephony](/documentation/hiddriverkit/telephony-enum)Usages for telephony devices, including telephone keypads and answering machines.[Consumer](/documentation/hiddriverkit/consumer-enum)Usages for app-specific controls on consumer devices, such as clocks, TVs, and audio equipment.[Digitizer](/documentation/hiddriverkit/digitizer-enum)Usages for digitizer devices, such as styluses and touch screens.[Physical Interface Device](/documentation/hiddriverkit/physical-interface-device-enum)Usages for devices with actuators or other physical interfaces.[Alphanumeric Display](/documentation/hiddriverkit/alphanumeric-display-enum)Usages for alphanumeric displays on consumer devices.[FIDO](/documentation/hiddriverkit/fido-enum)[Braille Device](/documentation/hiddriverkit/braille-device-enum)
